message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>Early case detection and isolation of infected individuals are critical to controlling COVID-19. RT-PCR is considered the diagnosis gold standard, but false-negatives occur. Based on previous work, we built a user-friendly online tool to estimate the probability of having COVID-19 with negative RT-PCR results and thus avoid preventable SARS-CoV-2 transmission.</jats:p>
title: Tool for estimating the probability of having COVID-19 with one or more negative RT-PCR results
